channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Connor Esterhuizen leads Proteas to crucial win, leveling T20 series against New Zealand
item.description: Proteas wicketkeeper-batter Connor Esterhuizen impressed during the fourth T20I against New Zealand in Wellington, playing a key role in his team’s 19-run victory that tied the series 2-2. Esterhuizen...

item.title: Durban teacher inspires pupils by combining Bollywood, Amapiano and education on TikTok
item.description: Nivz Daniels Bullyraj, a passionate teacher from Durban, has gained widespread attention for merging his love of dance with education. Through TikTok and other social media platforms, he motivates tee...

item.title: Two Emurua Dikirr aspirants withdraw from by‑election race involving ex‑MP Johana Ng’eno aide
item.description: Two aspirants eyeing the Emurua Dikirr parliamentary by‑election have dropped out of the race, giving room for other contestants including an ex‑aide to the late MP Johana Ng’eno to battle for the vac...

item.title: Dozens of Knut and Kuppet branch officials removed from office before national union elections
item.description: This article reports that about 40 branch leaders from the Kenya National Union of Teachers (Knut) and the Kenya Union of Post‑Primary Education Teachers (Kuppet) have been removed from their position...

item.title: Exploring Identity and Faith in Ayodhya Through Nishi Chawla’s Novel
item.description: Nishi Chawla’s novel, Silent Walls, Speaking Stones, is set in Ayodhya and explores the intersection of history, religion, and politics in shaping personal and communal identities. The story revolves ...

item.title: Delhi CM announces merger of key hospitals to increase MBBS, PG seats and enhance medical education
item.description: Delhi Chief Minister Rekha Gupta has announced a major plan to merge three prominent hospitals: Guru Teg Bahadur (GTB) Hospital, Delhi State Cancer Institute (DSCI), and Rajiv Gandhi Super Speciality ...

item.title: Government Plans Targeted Fuel Relief to Support Citizens Amid Global Supply Challenges
item.description: Finance Minister Muhammad Aurangzeb on Sunday explained that the government is shifting focus towards providing targeted relief to ensure that assistance reaches the people who really need it. This mo...

item.title: Netanyahu Visits Southern Israeli Town After Iranian Missile Strikes, Promises Action Against IRGC Leaders
item.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu don visit the town of Arad for inspection after Iran fire missile wey hit am the day before. Netanyahu talk say dem go pursue senior commanders of Iran Revolu...

item.title: T Velmurugan's TVK pulls out from DMK alliance ahead of Tamil Nadu elections, shaking ruling coalition
item.description: T Velmurugan, leader of the Tamilaga Valvurimai Katchi (TVK), has officially withdrawn his party from the DMK-led alliance, marking a significant setback for the ruling coalition ahead of the 2026 Tam...

item.title: The Deep Problems of Mainstream Economics and Its Moral Blind Spots
item.description: In his essay, Walden Bello explores the arguments in Nobel laureate Angus Deaton’s book, *Economics in America: An Immigrant Economist Explores the Land of Inequality*, and reflects on the serious mor...

item.title: UK Ministers Dismiss Claims That Iran Could Target London
item.description: UK Housing Secretary Steve Reed has stated that there is no evidence to support Israel's claim that Iran possesses long-range missiles capable of reaching London. The remarks came following Israel Def...

item.title: Ginninderra Tigers claim Douglas Cup after six years
item.description: Ginninderra Tigers have ended a six-year wait to claim the Douglas Cup in Cricket ACT, defeating Queanbeyan at Phillip Oval. The Tigers posted a first innings total of 340, thanks to notable contribut...

item.title: Eman Bacosa Pacquiao aims to build his own legacy in boxing and showbiz
item.description: Eman Bacosa Pacquiao, the 22-year-old son of boxing legend Manny Pacquiao, is steadily making a name for himself in the professional boxing scene while also entering the world of entertainment. Despit...

item.title: Cochlear CEO urges policy reforms amid heightened global uncertainty
item.description: Cochlear’s chief executive, Dig Howitt, has warned that global business conditions are now more uncertain than at any time he can recall, even compared to the COVID-19 pandemic. Speaking to The Austra...

item.title: Tanzania's ambitious plan to increase rural water access by 2030
item.description: As countries across the world commemorate World Water Day, Tanzania has unveiled a significant plan to enhance water supply in rural areas. The government has committed to investing a total of 787.5 b...

item.title: PCB restricts PSL 2026 matches to Lahore and Karachi, cancels crowds amid national austerity measures
item.description: The Pakistan Cricket Board (PCB) has confirmed that the 11th season of the Pakistan Super League (PSL) will proceed without spectators, with all matches limited to Lahore and Karachi as part of the fe...

item.title: China’s Zero-Tariff Trade Policy Offers New Opportunities for African Economies
item.description: Starting from May 1, 2026, China will implement full zero-tariff treatment on all tariff lines for 53 African countries that have established diplomatic relations with Beijing. This landmark policy ai...

item.title: West Coast Eagles End 14-Game Losing Streak with Strong Performances from Young Players
item.description: West Coast Eagles have finally broken their 14-game losing streak with a 17.9 (111) to 15.4 (94) victory over North Melbourne at Optus Stadium in front of 47,083 fans. Despite a shaky start where they...

item.title: Simba coach urges clinical finishing as team faces TRA United
item.description: Simba Sports Club Head Coach Steve Baker has underscored the need for his players to be more efficient in front of goal as they prepare to face TRA United in a crucial league match in Dar es Salaam. B...

item.title: DOE Allows Temporary Use of Euro 2 Fuels to Ensure Fuel Supply Security
item.description: The Department of Energy (DOE) has issued a circular that allows the temporary importation and use of Euro 2 petroleum products to ensure the country’s fuel supply remains stable. This applies to spec...
